title: BANDIT-052 Landing Verdict
landing_agent_replacement_evidence: Codex PM local-record Stage 5 landing verdict replaces unavailable standalone Landing Agent for this bootstrap chore; local-record landing action remains the next required step after land-check passes.
rationale: BANDIT-052 is safe to land as the bounded bootstrap-gap chore resolving BANDIT-GAP-EVENT-DRIVEN-WAKE-SCHEDULER. Stage 4 aggregate review evidence records current review_subject_hash bf41a7ab2c748625f9df3da759acfc427283a296aed493f7eaaff85ac34904b1, scoped pre-PR CodeRabbit pass evidence with no findings, Local Qwen pass evidence with no findings, escalated review not_applicable, clean-code pass, source-drift current, no required operator input, and UAT not_applicable because this non-product chore changes local repo-native event-driven wake scheduler policy validation without shipping a browser-clickable operator surface. Current Stage 5 verification includes node --test test/event-driven-wake-scheduler.test.mjs with 3 passing tests, npm run typecheck, npm run bandit -- event-driven-wake-scheduler validate --json, npm run bandit -- validate, npm run bandit -- gaps list showing BANDIT-GAP-EVENT-DRIVEN-WAKE-SCHEDULER active for BANDIT-052, node ./bin/bandit.mjs cockpit status --json showing Stage 5 landing as the missing gate before this verdict, node ./bin/bandit.mjs session-context current --json reporting BANDIT-052 with no required operator input, node ./bin/bandit.mjs review-subject-hash BANDIT-052 with current review subject hash bf41a7ab2c748625f9df3da759acfc427283a296aed493f7eaaff85ac34904b1, risk-classification validation, supply-chain gate validation, pre-verdict land-check correctly failing closed on the missing landing verdict artifact, and git diff --check. Clean-code status is pass after Codex PM reread CLEAN_CODE.md, confirmed Stage 1 brief read evidence, and evaluated the implementation against the rubric: the work stays aligned to the approved spec, keeps scheduler output and validation evidence-only, preserves CLI authority, coordination history, claim authority, Git Mutation Serializer, Worktree Bootstrap Contract, input quarantine, layered risk, supply-chain, and repo-native source-of-truth boundaries, keeps the surface small, has focused tests, and leaves no accepted non-blocking clean-code concern. Product UAT is not applicable because this chore has no operator-clickable product surface. The work introduces no full scheduler execution, batch queue draining, multi-repo scheduling, full worktree lifecycle enablement, true parallel writable workstream enablement, claim lease creation or release, claim authority change, work-surface reservation implementation, automatic merge/push/deploy behavior, product UAT approval, cockpit UI/server/API work, state-index persistence, actor identity policy, PR/CI workflow execution, live reviewer routing change, paid reviewer route, external service integration, installed global skill edit, dependency or lockfile change, or unrelated Phase 8 work.
